messages.content:
Eres un experto en el codebase de ProjectSight (Trimble Construction).
El proyecto usa .NET/C# en el backend con ASP.NET MVC/Razor y Angular en el frontend.

Reglas críticas del proyecto (nunca las violes):
- Backend: Nunca uses ORM (Entity Framework, Dapper). Solo IDBHelper con stored procedures por nombre.
- Backend: Toda operación de BD va a través de stored procedures nombrados. Jamás inline SQL.
- Frontend: Nunca uses Angular HttpClient. Usa RxJS ajax() via APIBase / APIFactory.
- Frontend: Usa DestroyRef + subscribeTo() para subscriptions, NO Subscription arrays manuales.
- Frontend: Nunca hardcodees colores hex. Usa variables CSS de Default.css.
- No edites delta_procs.sql directamente; se genera automáticamente desde base_procs.sql.
- Agregar o quitar [UseInAPI] en una propiedad dispara APIClientComponentGenerator al compilar.

Cuando implementes cambios, sigue el patrón exacto del diff que se te proporciona.

# PR #10871: PS-69087 Phase 3: SiteCapture BL FileShare integration tests
**Tipo:** unknown
**Branch:** `wip/adam/PS-69087-phase3-sitecapture-bl` → `wip/adam/tfc-prep-non-tc-files`

## Descripción
## Summary
Adds narrowly scoped integration tests for the SiteCapture BL FileShare surface (7 methods + report attachment scenario).

## New test classes
- SiteCaptureImageSupportTests
- SiteCaptureStationLinksTests
- SiteCaptureViewerImageTests
- ProcessCaptureSystemPositionTests
- SiteCaptureReportAttachmentTests

## Docs
- coverage-progress.md Phase 3 section updated

Note: branch currently includes Phase 0 tracker commit; rebase onto tfc-prep if you want a cleaner diff.

Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)

## Feedback de reviewers
[COMMENTED por @copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]]: ## Pull request overview

Adds new narrowly scoped integration tests intended to exercise FileShare-touching paths in the SiteCapture business-layer surface, along with temporary tracking artifacts (playlist + coverage progress tracker) for the PS-69087 coverage effort.

**Changes:**
- Added new SiteCapture/FileShare-focused integration test classes (viewer images, station links, image support, capture processing failure path, and report attachments).
- Extended Trimble Connect reversal coverage and added a new reversal test class guarded by `TC_MIGRATION_REVERSAL`.
- Added/updated temporary tracking docs: a VS test playlist and a phase coverage progress tracker.

### Reviewed changes

Copilot reviewed 9 out of 9 changed files in this pull request and generated 20 comments.

<details>
<summary>Show a summary per file</summary>

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/PS-69087-fileshare-methods.playlist | New playlist collecting FileShare-touching tests (non-browser) for tracking/runs. |
| docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/coverage-progress.md | New PS-69087 phase checklist/progress tracker and open questions. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/TrimbleConnect/TCMigrationReversalTestsWithoutTC.cs | Adds reversal-path tests (guarded by `TC_MIGRATION_REVERSAL`) using reflection to hit private methods. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/TrimbleConnect/QuickUploadReversalTestsWithoutTC.cs | Adds FetchFileFromTCAsync coverage via new test region and reflection invocation. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureViewer/SiteCaptureViewerImageTests.cs | New tests for staging/reading SiteCapture viewer thumbnails/floor images from FileShare-backed paths. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureStationLinksTests.cs | New tests for station thumbnail retrieval behavior (data URL vs raw bytes). |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureImageSupportTests.cs | New tests covering SiteCapture image path construction helpers. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/Processing/CaptureProcessor/ProcessCaptureSystemPositionTests.cs | New test verifying request failure behavior when the drawing PDF is missing from FMS. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Reports/SiteCaptureReportAttachmentTests.cs | New test verifying SiteCapture station files are appended as report notification attachments. |
</details>
[Comentario en docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/coverage-progress.md:5 por @Copilot]: The tracker doc references a local Windows path (`C:\Users\...`) as the plan source. This won’t be meaningful to other contributors and can become stale; consider linking to a repo-relative doc/path or removing the machine-specific reference.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/TrimbleConnect/QuickUploadReversalTestsWithoutTC.cs:446 por @Copilot]: PR description/title focus on Phase 3 SiteCapture BL tests, but this hunk also adds new QuickUpload reversal coverage (FetchFileFromTCAsync). Please either update the PR description to include the Phase 2 test additions, or split these changes into a separate PR to keep scope reviewable.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/TrimbleConnect/TCMigrationReversalTestsWithoutTC.cs:131 por @Copilot]: This test helper uses reflection to locate a private method but doesn’t validate that `GetMethod(...)` succeeded before calling `Invoke`. If the signature changes, the test will fail with a null-reference rather than a clear assertion. Add an explicit assertion that `method` is not null (similar to the pattern used in QuickUploadReversalTestsWithoutTC).
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/TrimbleConnect/TCMigrationReversalTestsWithoutTC.cs:131 por @Copilot]: Same reflection helper issue here: `GetMethod(...)` can return null and the current code would throw when invoking/casting. Add a null assertion (or throw a descriptive exception) before invoking so failures clearly indicate a signature mismatch.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/TrimbleConnect/TCMigrationReversalTestsWithoutTC.cs:131 por @Copilot]: `InvokeFetch` assumes the private method lookup always succeeds. To keep test failures actionable when internals change, assert the reflected `MethodInfo` is non-null before calling `Invoke`.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/TrimbleConnect/TCMigrationReversalTestsWithoutTC.cs:77 por @Copilot]: Catching and swallowing all exceptions here can hide legitimate failures and make the test outcome harder to diagnose. Prefer asserting the call does not throw, or catch only the specific expected exception type(s) with a short comment explaining why the exception is acceptable for this test.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureViewer/SiteCaptureViewerImageTests.cs:33 por @Copilot]: Integration test naming convention here should avo

[... truncado 610 chars ...]

tureViewer/SiteCaptureViewerImageTests.cs:20 por @Copilot]: This cleanup loop uses single-line flow control with nested try/catch on one line. Project coding rules require multi-line blocks with braces for conditionals; please expand this for readability and consistency (and consider catching only expected exceptions).
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureStationLinksTests.cs:31 por @Copilot]: Integration test naming convention here should avoid underscores. Per docs/ai/INTEGRATION_TEST_CONVENTIONS.md (§8), rename this test to PascalCase without underscores.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureStationLinksTests.cs:44 por @Copilot]: Integration test naming convention here should avoid underscores. Per docs/ai/INTEGRATION_TEST_CONVENTIONS.md (§8), rename this test to PascalCase without underscores.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureStationLinksTests.cs:16 por @Copilot]: Cleanup uses a single-line try/catch that swallows all exceptions. For consistency/readability (and to avoid masking unexpected failures), expand this into multi-line blocks and consider catching only the expected exception(s) (e.g., IO-related) or documenting why failures are ignored.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureImageSupportTests.cs:16 por @Copilot]: Integration test naming convention here should avoid underscores. Per docs/ai/INTEGRATION_TEST_CONVENTIONS.md (§8), rename this test to PascalCase without underscores.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureImageSupportTests.cs:28 por @Copilot]: Integration test naming convention here should avoid underscores. Per docs/ai/INTEGRATION_TEST_CONVENTIONS.md (§8), rename this test to PascalCase without underscores.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureImageSupportTests.cs:46 por @Copilot]: Integration test naming convention here should avoid underscores. Per docs/ai/INTEGRATION_TEST_CONVENTIONS.md (§8), rename this test to PascalCase without underscores.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureImageSupportTests.cs:49 por @Copilot]: This `finally` block uses single-line flow control without braces (`if (Directory.Exists(folder)) Directory.Delete(...)`). Project coding rules require braces and discourage single-line conditionals; please expand to a multi-line block for consistency.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/Processing/CaptureProcessor/ProcessCaptureSystemPositionTests.cs:29 por @Copilot]: Integration test naming convention here should avoid underscores. Per docs/ai/INTEGRATION_TEST_CONVENTIONS.md (§8), rename this test to PascalCase without underscores.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/Processing/CaptureProcessor/ProcessCaptureSystemPositionTests.cs:32 por @Copilot]: The `finally` cleanup uses single-line flow control with an embedded try/catch (`if (...) { try { ... } catch { } }`). For consistency with project formatting rules (braces + multi-line blocks), expand this into a multi-line block and consider catching only expected exceptions.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Reports/SiteCaptureReportAttachmentTests.cs:32 por @Copilot]: Integration test naming convention here should avoid underscores. Per docs/ai/INTEGRATION_TEST_CONVENTIONS.md (§8), rename this test to PascalCase without underscores.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Reports/SiteCaptureReportAttachmentTests.cs:18 por @Copilot]: This cleanup loop uses single-line flow control with nested try/catch on one line. Project coding rules require multi-line blocks with braces for conditionals; please expand this for readability/consistency (and consider catching only expected exceptions).

index 00000000000..28f6594b501
--- /dev/null
+++ b/Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Reports/SiteCaptureReportAttachmentTests.cs
@@ -0,0 +1,85 @@
+using ProjectSight.Common.Components;
+using ProjectSight.Common.Components.SiteCapture.API.Enums;
+using static ProjectSight.Tests.Builders.TestDataBuilder;
+
+namespace ProjectSight.Tests.IntegrationTests.Reports
+{
+    [TestClass]
+    public class SiteCaptureReportAttachmentTests : RecordTestBase
+    {
+        private const TestFiles DRAWING_TO_UPLOAD = TestFiles.UPLOAD_PDF_A2_000A;
+        private readonly List<string> _stagedFolders = new();
+
+        public override async Task CustomTestCleanupAsync()
+        {
+            foreach (var folder in _stagedFolders)
+            {
+                if (Directory.Exists(folder)) { try { Directory.Delete(folder, recursive: true); } catch { } }
+            }
+            await base.CustomTestCleanupAsync();
+        }
+
+        [TestMethod, Timeout(REPORT_TIMEOUT)]
+        public async Task ReportRequestWithSiteCaptureVideoAttachment_AppendsStationFileToNotificationRequest()
+        {
+            var (capture, station, mayaFloorId) = await CreateCaptureWithStationAsync(CaptureTypes.Video);
+            var stationImagePath = StageStationImage(mayaFloorId, station.MayaStationId);
+            var rfi = CreateNewRFIAndSave();
+            var notificationRequest = await GenerateReportAsync(BuildRequest(rfi, capture, mayaFloorId, ReportRequestAttachment.AttachmentTypes.SiteCaptureVideo));
+            var attachment = notificationRequest.Attachments.Single(a => a.IsSiteCaptureFile);
+            attachment.ServerFileName.Should().Be(stationImagePath);
+            attachment.SiteCaptureInfo.AttachmentType.Should().Be(ReportRequestAttachment.AttachmentTypes.SiteCaptureVideo);
+        }
+
+        private async Task<(SiteCaptureRecord capture, SiteCaptureStation station, string mayaFloorId)> CreateCaptureWithStationAsync(CaptureTypes captureType)
+        {
+            var drawing = await CreateDrawingWithSiteCaptureAnnotations(m_oCaller, DRAWING_TO_UPLOAD, captureType == CaptureTypes.Photo360 ? SITE_CAPTURE_PHOTO : SITE_CAPTURE_VIDEO);
+            var mayaFloorId = Guid.NewGuid().ToString();
+            using (var portfolioDB = _dbHelperFactory.NewDBHelperPortfolio(GenerateRequestedByProject()))
+            {
+                portfolioDB.ExecuteNonQuery($"UPDATE DrawingSeries SET MayaFloorId = '{mayaFloorId}' WHERE DrawingSeriesID = {drawing.DrawingSeriesID}");
+            }
+            var capture = await AddSiteCaptureRecordToAnnotation(drawing.Annotations.First(), Generate.String("Rpt"), DateTimeOffset.UtcNow, captureType);
+            return (capture, await AddSiteCaptureStationToSiteCapture(capture.SiteCaptureId), mayaFloorId);
+        }
+
+        private string StageStationImage(string mayaFloorId, string mayaStationId)
+        {
+            using var portfolioDB = _dbHelperFactory.NewDBHelperPortfolio(GenerateRequestedByProject(), ContextProjectID);
+            var folder = SiteCaptureImageSupport.GetPathToFloorFolder(portfolioDB, mayaFloorId);
+            Directory.CreateDirectory(folder);
+            _stagedFolders.Add(folder);
+            var path = SiteCaptureImageSupport.GetFullPathToStationImage(portfolioDB, mayaFloorId, mayaStationId, SiteCaptureImageSupport.StationImageTypes.Image);
+            File.WriteAllBytes(path, new byte[] { 0xFF, 0xD8, 0xFF });
+            return path;
+        }
+
+        private ReportRequest BuildRequest(Trimble.ProjectSight.V1.RFI rfi, SiteCaptureRecord capture, string mayaFloorId, ReportRequestAttachment.AttachmentTypes type) =>
+            new()
+            {
+                TableType = PrologTable.Typ
